scripts.auth-service:grpc:gen: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('./services/auth-service/generated', {recursive:true})" && python -m grpc_tools.protoc -I=./docs/communication/grpc --python_out=./services/auth-service/generated --grpc_python_out=./services/auth-service/generated ./docs/communication/grpc/auth.proto && cd services/auth-service && uv run ./fix_grpc_imports.py
scripts.install:all: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web" -c "green,cyan,magenta" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm install" "cd services/auth-service && uv sync" "cd services/web && pnpm install"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web" -c "green,cyan,magenta" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm start:dev" "cd services/auth-service && uv run ./dev.py" "cd services/web && pnpm dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -n "api-gateway,web" -c "green,magenta" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm build" "cd services/web && pnpm build"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web" -c "green,cyan,magenta" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm start:prod" "cd services/auth-service && uv run ./main.py" "cd services/web && pnpm start"
scripts.test: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service" -c "green,cyan" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm test" "cd services/auth-service && uv run pytest ."
